questionHtml: Use Euler’s method with a step size of 0.1 to find an approximation for y when x=0.5. Give your answer correct to four significant figures.
markschemeHtml:
attempt to use recursive formula yn=yn-1+0.14-yn-110

y1= 2.02                    (A1)

y5= 2.098                    A1

 

Note: Accept any answer which rounds to the correct 4sf value.

Award no marks for a final answer of 2.1 or 2.10 with no working.

[3 marks]

meta.title: Use Euler’s method with a step size of 0.1 to find an approximation for y when x=0.5. Give your answer correct to four significant figures.
breadcrumbLabels: AHL 5.18—1st order DE’s – Euler method, variables separable, integrating factor, homogeneous DE using sub y=vx
